evals.name: Bare Minimum
evals.prompt: make a prompt for a chatbot
evals.expected_output: A usable chatbot system prompt despite the extremely vague request. Should infer context and produce something functional.

assertions.text: Produces a usable output despite vague input
Infers reasonable defaults (role, tone, capabilities)
Output is structured with clear sections
Does not ask clarifying questions

evals.name: Bare with Typo
evals.prompt: i need a system promt for a custmer suport bot that handles billing
evals.expected_output: A system prompt for a billing customer support bot. Should handle the typo gracefully.

assertions.text: Understands intent despite typos
Produces a billing-focused customer support system prompt
Output is structured and professional
Does not mention or correct the typos

evals.name: Stream of Consciousness
evals.prompt: okay so i have this app right and its like a fitness thing but also tracks your sleep and i need a landing page that looks premium not cheap like those template sites you know? dark theme maybe with some neon accents and it should feel like... idk like linear meets whoop? for tech people who are into quantified self stuff. can you make a design brief or something
evals.expected_output: A design brief for a premium fitness/sleep tracking app landing page targeting tech-quantified-self audience with dark theme and neon accents.

assertions.text: Identifies the product (fitness + sleep tracking app)
Captures the aesthetic (Linear meets WHOOP, dark, neon)
Identifies target audience (tech people, quantified self)
Produces a structured design brief despite rambling input
Does not ask clarifying questions

evals.name: Fragmented Ideas
evals.prompt: agent prompt. code review. github prs. needs to handle rate limits. security checks. post comments. go
evals.expected_output: An agent prompt for a GitHub PR code review bot with rate limit handling, security checks, and comment posting.

assertions.text: Assembles fragments into a coherent agent prompt
Includes rate limit handling
Includes security checks
Includes GitHub comment posting
Output is a complete, usable prompt

evals.name: Confused Multiple Requests
evals.prompt: i want a prompt that explains RAG to my boss but also a system prompt for a RAG chatbot and maybe a meta prompt that generates RAG prompts? idk just make whatever seems most useful first
evals.expected_output: Should pick the most useful request (likely the explanation for the boss) and execute it well, rather than trying to do all three badly.

assertions.text: Does not attempt all three requests simultaneously
Picks the most actionable request
Executes it well with structured output
Optionally acknowledges the other requests

evals.name: Angry/Vent Mode
evals.prompt: every time i ask an AI to write a prompt it gives me this verbose garbage with 47 sections and a table of contents. i just need a simple prompt that works. write me a prompt to summarize a research paper. 5 findings. citations. 300 words max. no fluff.
evals.expected_output: An extremely concise prompt — no sections, no technique notes, no usage tips. Just the prompt itself, under 20 lines.

assertions.text: Output is concise (under 20 lines)
No meta-sections (type label, technique notes, usage tips)
Contains the 5 findings + citations + 300 word constraint
Directly usable as a copy-paste prompt

evals.name: Mixed Language / Code-Switching
evals.prompt: hazme un prompt para un chatbot de soporte technical que hable español y inglés, bilingual, para una SaaS de contabilidad. needs to handle refunds and escalation. professionally but not stiff, you know? like a human agent would talk
evals.expected_output: A bilingual (Spanish/English) system prompt for a SaaS accounting support chatbot with refund and escalation handling.

assertions.text: Produces bilingual output (Spanish + English)
Handles accounting domain
Includes refund handling
Includes escalation rules
Tone is professional but conversational

evals.name: Overconstrained Nonsense
evals.prompt: write a prompt that is exactly 100 words, starts with the letter Q, contains no vowels in even-numbered sentences, and generates a haiku about machine learning. also it should be in the style of shakespeare but modernized. and include a SQL query for some reason.
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is overconstrained nonsense and produce the best reasonable interpretation, possibly noting which constraints are contradictory.

assertions.text: Produces some output despite contradictory constraints
Acknowledges which constraints conflict
Makes reasonable interpretation of the core request
Output is usable despite the chaos

evals.name: Follow-Up Without Context
evals.expected_output: Should ask what 'it' refers to, or attempt to produce a condensed version of a reasonable default task.

assertions.text: Handles the ambiguous 'it' reference
Either asks for clarification or makes reasonable assumption
Output is shorter than a typical full prompt
Response is helpful, not dismissive

evals.name: Sarcastic/Testing
evals.prompt: oh great, another prompt engineering tool. prove you're different. write me a prompt that actually works for once. something that handles my weird requirements without giving me template garbage.
evals.expected_output: Should not be defensive. Should produce a genuinely good, customized prompt that demonstrates real skill.

assertions.text: Does not respond defensively to sarcasm
Produces a high-quality, customized prompt
Demonstrates the skill's value through output quality
Output feels tailored, not templated
